nasb.text: By faith he kept the Passover and the sprinkling of the blood, so that he who destroyed the firstborn would not touch them.

esv.text: By faith he kept the Passover and sprinkled the blood, so that the Destroyer of the firstborn might not touch them.

cnv.text: 因著信，他立了逾越節和灑血的禮，免得那滅命的侵犯以色列人的長子。

ccb.text: 他凭信心守逾越节，行洒血的礼，免得那位杀长子的伤害以色列人。

csbs.text: 因着信，他立了逾越节和洒血的礼，免得那毁灭长子的碰以色列人。
